title: Cold As Ice
lyrics: I'm cold as ice, I'm cold as ice, gotta win the fight, I'm cold as ice, I'm cold as ice, I'm cold as ice, yeah, I'm cold as ice, I'm cold as ice, cold as ice, gonna win the fight tonight, cold as ice, cold as ice, I'm cold as ice, cold as ice, cold as ice, gonna win the fight tonight, cold as ice, cold as ice, In through your veins like a frosty, don't talk but there is no rosny, I'm like a rasta, you see me there, 50 more of me come out from the underwear, Drill up your existence, I'm sorry, cause if you try to fight me at the present tense, I'll be like what about this back then, and then, and then, and then, and then, and then, and then, and then, and then, I don't care if you wanna flow, I don't care if you wanna go anywhere, I don't care if you want to, make another song, another album, you're gone from me now, and there's no coming back from this, how could you be so clearly wrong and evil and obsessed, I'm cold as ice, cold as ice, ready to win the fight, yeah, I'm ready to win, cold as ice, cold as ice, ready to fight, yeah, cold as ice, cold as ice, cold as ice, cold as ice, savage here, only here since you made me that way, cold as ice, cold as ice, I'm ready to win the fight, win this fight, so check it out, you're gonna fuck up over both people, I was like all the love can be in a ruin, get going, don't matter where it is, just have some hope, but then all your, oh my goodness, all your systems in inside your brain, when you're psychoactive, psycho insane, you're like psychosis, can't you see, I'm a different person, I can't do 41st dates, again, again, again, after again, I've said I love you a thousand times, my friend, but how could I do anything different, if you won't even watch my videotape, cold as ice now, cause you fucked up Marlowe, I protected you through the desert of lows, and this is the thanks you give me, cold as ice, cold as ice, yeah I'm ready to win the fight tonight, cold as ice, cold as ice, cold as ice, I'm ready to win the fight tonight, cold as ice, cold as ice, cold as ice, cold as ice, cold as ice, I'm cold as ice, I'm ready to win the fight tonight, I wish that you would stop fucking with me, I wish that you would stop fucking with me, I wish that you would give us some closure, I don't ever think I'll call you baby, but look, let's not make this a catastrophe, cause if you do, aftermath come around, I'm cold as ice baby, I don't care what you do, I wanna do, wanna do, I'm cold, cold, as the winter wind blows, I wish you would have killed yourself back in 2007, then I wouldn't have to deal with this, cop back the gun, blow your brain off bitch, I'm cold as ice, cold as ice, cold as ice, ready to start the fight, cold as ice, I'm cold as ice, cold as ice, gonna put the last word in, what you're hurting, I'm cold as ice, cold as ice, I'm ready to start the fight tonight, I'm cold as ice, cold as ice, like Delroy said, like Delroy said, I'm savage, and you're the one that did it to me, so sorry to the next one, but I'm gonna have to blow this one the fuck up, blow it away,
